arabic: وَزَادَ أَحْمَدُ فِي آخِرِهِ قِصَّةَ قَوْلِ بِلَالٍ فِي آذَانِ اَلْفَجْرِ: { اَلصَّلَاةُ خَيْرٌ مِنَ اَلنَّوْمِ }   1‏ .‏‏1 ‏- انظر ما قبله.‏

english.narrator: Ahmad added to the end of the above Hadith, the story of BIlal's statement in the Fajr Adhan (morning prayer call):
english.text: as-Salatu khairun minan-nawm - "Prayer is better than sleep".
